reviews.comment:
Un verdadero desastre la limpieza del lugar, ayer fui a comer con mi hijo y en plato bien acomodada y cocinada junto a la milanesa estaba una tremenda cucaracha cocinada y bien servida en el plato , a lo q me fui pedirle algún tipo de explicación a las que estaban atendiendo y como favor me dicen despreocúpate no te voy a cobrar el plato con el bicho , que verdadero desastre,  son un ascooooo

(Translated by Google)
The cleanliness of this place is a complete disaster. Yesterday I went to eat with my son, and on my plate, neatly arranged and cooked next to the breaded cutlet, was a huge cockroach, cooked and served on the plate. I went to ask the staff for an explanation, and they told me, as a favor, not to worry, they wouldn't charge me for the dish with the bug. What a disaster! They're disgusting!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtazhHWnB3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Un lugar pequeño. Los sándwiches y tartas son muy caros y poco sabrosos. Un alfajor Guaymallén me salió $150. Me pareció una estafa!

(Translated by Google)
A small place. The sandwiches and cakes are very expensive and bland. A Guaymallén alfajor cost me $150. I thought it was a rip-off!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtOWVMaTRBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Terrible tarta de brócoli muy buena, los jugos de arándanos y pomelo muy bueno...atención 13 puntos. Muy bien por esta estación que ofrece comida para comer sano. había unos postres terribles también...poco lugar para parar en camion pero en auto muy bien lugar y sombra

(Translated by Google)
The broccoli tart was terrific, but the cranberry and grapefruit juices were very good...service was excellent. Kudos to this station for offering healthy food. They had some terrible desserts too...limited space for trucks to stop, but plenty of room and shade for cars.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtdFpuRkNnEAE

reviews.comment:
Era excelente lugar hoy quedó en el tiempo falta reformas. Igualmente la comida del servicompras es excelente

(Translated by Google)
It was a great place, but now it needs renovations. The food at the grocery store is also excellent.
